subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face to the Abha Kingdom! Now is the time for oneness and unity, the time for love and harmony among the hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی وقت یگانگی و اتحاد است و هنگام الفت قلوب و وداد مظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @suffering and imprisonment
